results.rendered_html:
ās, āḥ ind. An interjection, implying (a) Recollection; āḥ upanayatu bhavān bhūrjapatraṃ  V. 2.  (b) Anger; āḥ kathamadyāpi rākṣasatrāsaḥ  U. 1 ; āḥ pāpe tiṣṭha tiṣṭha  Māl. 8.  (c) Pain; āḥ śītaṃ  K. P. 10.  (d) Angry
(pb) contradiction (apākaraṇa); āḥ ka eṣa mayi sthite  Mu. 1 ; āḥ vṛthāmaṃgalapāṭhaka  Ve. 1.  (e) Sorrow, regret; vidyāmātaramāḥ pradarśya nṛpaśūn bhikṣāmahe nistrapāḥ  Udb. ; (āḥ smaraṇe'pākaraṇe kopasaṃtāpayostathā  Med. ).
